notes: Two-leg AUDUSD/NZDUSD cointegration pair from the approved card. The EA runs from the AUDUSD.DWX host setfile and reads both D1 close series to compute ln(AUDUSD) - beta * ln(NZDUSD).
Q04 retry metadata pins USD tester currency and the canonical Deposit=100000 so the logical basket dispatch path is explicit, matching the USD-settled RISK_FIXED=1000 setfile.
